prompt_snapshot:
16:9 horizontal Chinese blog body illustration, 2560x1440.
Use the provided chibi Avilia reference as the character identity anchor: red hair, black outfit, small cross motif.

Scene: Avilia repairs a nearly complete machine labeled "量化系统". The machine has a few loose gears and warning tags around data, backtest, and edge cases. An AI assistant happily hands over a large finished frame, while Avilia uses a small wrench and checklist to fix the tricky details.

Core meaning: AI can build a lot, but details, data issues, and debugging still need human judgment.

Style: clean editorial blog illustration, lots of white space, black lines, dark red accents, small blue status lights. Minimal Chinese labels: "细节坑", "数据问题", "人来收口".

Avoid clutter, avoid gloomy mood, avoid PPT flowchart, avoid showing actual private code.
